faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

college_info.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Fattu Dhinga

highlights.summary:
Established in 2011, Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) Fattu Dhinga is a regional campus of the main Guru Nanak Dev University located in Amritsar. Set-up at a sprawling area of 45 acre, this regional campus offers a wide range of UG and PG programmes, such as BTech, BSc, BCA, BBA and MCA, among others to the students. Admission to all the courses is completely based on merit followed by counselling conducted by GNDU.

Approved by the UGC, the teaching pedagogy of this regional campus is a perfect blend of education and extracurricular activities where both the students and the teachers freely interact with each other. This University campus also has a Technical Student Society which actively organises different activities related to enhance the technical and overall personality of the students. GNDU Fattu Dhinga has divided its courses and their respective operations under five departments, which include:

Major highlights regarding GNDU Fattu Dhinga campus are as follows:

GNDU Fattu Dhinga campus follows both online and offline admission process across all its courses. Candidates can fill the form available on the official website of GNDU or obtain the application form from the admission/regional office. For all programmes, final selection is based on merit scores in the last qualifying exam followed by a University-conducted counselling round. For BTech, however, the University also accepts a valid score in JEE Main exam to shortlist candidates. More details around GNDU Fattu Dhinga admission process are as follows:

GNDU Fattu Dhinga campus offers a wide range of UG and PG courses across such as BTech, BCA BBA, BCom, BSc, BA and MCA. All these courses are offered across various fields such as Engineering, Science, Arts & Humanities, Management, Commerce & Accounting and Computers & IT. All the UG courses offered by this University are of three-year duration except for BTech which is a four-year programme. The only PG course offered by GNDU Fattu Dhinga, i.e. MCA, is a three-year programme. Check out the minimum eligibility criteria for all GNDU Fattu Dhinga courses along with their first-year fee in the table below:

Note: Apart from all the courses mentioned above, this University campus also offers BVoc in Software Development. Moreover, the fee structure mentioned for all the courses is as per the brochure of 2017. The actual fee may vary with the fee mentioned above.

Read more: GNDU Fattu Dhinga Courses

GNDU Fattu Dhinga has a centralised placements facility across all the departments. This training and placements department not only conducts placement drives for its students but also organises joint campus placements for all the students across North India. Some of the prominent recruiters who have hired the students of this University campus include:

The students at the regional Fattu Dhinga campus of Guru Nanak Dev University are offered a wide range of scholarships on the basis of a variety of parameters, such as merit, need-basis, among other factors. Also at a central level, GNDU offers financial aid to various financially weak and needy students via fee concessions. A number of scholarships such as merit-cum-means scholarships are also awarded by the Department of Minority Affairs under Government of India. An extensive list of scholarships awarded/organisations offering scholarships to the students of this University campus is as follows:

placements.overview:
Established in 2011, Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) Fattu Dhinga is a regional campus of the main Guru Nanak Dev University located in Amritsar. Set-up at a sprawling area of 45 acre, this regional campus offers a wide range of UG and PG programmes, such as BTech, BSc, BCA, BBA and MCA, among others to the students. Admission to all the courses is completely based on merit followed by counselling conducted by GNDU.

Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Fattu Dhinga, is located in Punjab. Established in 2011, it is a public university. Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Fattu Dhinga provides 12 UG and PG courses in 3 specialisations, namely Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Fashion Design. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc., MCA, BCA and B.Com are some of the courses offered at Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Fattu Dhinga. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Design. The total fee at Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Fattu Dhinga ranges between INR 7,360 to 4,54,975. Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Fattu Dhinga has a student intake of 490 for all the courses. The average median package at Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Fattu Dhinga is . Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Fattu Dhinga offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

Q. Does GNDU Fattu Dhinga offer hostel facilities to its students?

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Sep -2022) B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: A good university in Punjab.

review_content.Placements: I got placed in Capgemini. Lots of companies used to come there like TCS, Capgemini, Software AG, John Deere, etc. So one get lots of opportunities there to be recruited in MNCs. The placement of the university's regional campuses is held at one place, that is Amritsar branch, so all the students of different campuses are competing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, but one has to walk 1 km to reach by foot to the place because the bus stop is a little far away. Otherwise, all the things are good. You will not get infrastructure like private universities, but being a government university, it is worth as the input of AMNT is very low as compared to other universities where the fees is very much high.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college.

review_content.Placements: There are 150 students in our batch. There are no placements in this course. You have to work hard and get a PG seat, a job, or a clinic with MBBS only. Internships are offered at this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average. Our college is under construction. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college. Laboratories are available. There is a small canteen in this college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. The teaching quality is average. Semester exams are average. This college is affiliated with RGUHS. The pass percentage is 50%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Only for those who wish to join the government medical college.

review_content.Placements: Every batch of 150 students is placed. After the completion of 4.5 years, there will be 1 year of work as a house surgeon, for which you will be paid INR 30k per month. After completing 5.5 years, you are posted to rural service, where you are offered INR 45 to 60k per month (only for Kea students).
review_content.Infrastructure: Currently, we don't have our own medical college building; classes are being held in the government engineering college. After the completion of the first year, we will be shifted to a new building. The hostel is below average. It contains only a mess facility and rooms. Each room has an attached bathroom that needs to be cleaned by you only.

description: Haveri Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Haveri Institute of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23733 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Haveri Institute of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 23733 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23839 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Haveri Institute of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
The 3rd round of seat allotment for Haveri Institute of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been announced for MD, MS programmes for various categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 12152 to 131058, with MS in Obstetrics and Gynaecology being the most challenging for admission. To see more information, students can check out the table below.

Haveri Institute of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in Forensic Medicine, with a round 3 closing rank of 107605 for the General AI category.
Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff data for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for different categories, quotas and rounds.

In this section, Haveri Institute of Medical Sciences Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Haveri Institute of Medical Sciences. college_info.college_name: Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Bareilly: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Bareilly is an institute. It is located in Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh. Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Bareilly provides UG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 1 course across specialisation such as Veterinary Science. Some of the course offered at this institute include BVSC. Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Bareilly offers these course across fields such as Science. Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Bareilly offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSC) and Animal Husbandry (AH - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Great campus life, good infrastructure and ample opportunities to learn and grow.

review_content.Placements: Top roles offered include veterinary officers, academicians, scientists, researchers, and pathologists. Selection of students is through NEET examination. It is the number one ranked veterinary university. It is a central university and the stipend given to PG and Ph.D. students is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped laboratories, modern hostel infrastructure, and well-managed mess facility. Teachers and scientists are well-read and qualified. Technical staff is present in all divisions for technical help to researchers. Environment is student-friendly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSC) and Animal Husbandry (AH - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the facilities. It also offers good placements.

review_content.Placements: I'm still studying so I can't tell much about my batch but from the interns batch which passed out this year, whosoever applied for job in placement cell got placed in good company like Virbac and other good companies. The package offered was also good as a fresher. Our college provides average placements and quite a good ROI.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is the best in India. The college has good lab facilities and clinics. The hostel doesn't have enough capacity. Seats are increasing every year so the college is facing problems to accommodate the increasing number students taking admission every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSC) and Animal Husbandry (AH - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It was good for research purposes in veterinary science in the nation.

review_content.Placements: Few students got placed. The rest found placements on their own. Many animal product companies hired students. Some joined clinics after completing their degree. Many received scholarships based on merit and government scholarships for weaker sections. Top roles included clinicians, those starting their own ventures, and a few found jobs in laboratories and clinical complexes.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities as per feels. Hostel life was charming and fun-loving. People taught different cultures and traditions from their places as almost all festivals were celebrated. Food was of good quality depending on the prices charged. Different state messes were available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSC) and Animal Husbandry (AH - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is the Mecca and Medina of Veterinary Science.

review_content.Placements: They place several students successfully in various departments. Some become veterinary officers, some opt for PG, while others go abroad, like to Oxford University in London. Students also get government jobs in various hospitals as certified doctors.
review_content.Infrastructure: Various facilities like Wi-Fi, library, and courts are provided. Girls' hostel is well-maintained with proper cleanliness, a badminton court, Wi-Fi, and hygienic food in the mess. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, including SMART boards, space, and ventilation.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus life, good infrastructure and ample opportunities to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped laboratories, modern hostel infrastructure, and well-managed mess facility. Teachers and scientists are well-read and qualified. Technical staff is present in all divisions for technical help to researchers. Environment is student-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the facilities. It also offers good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is the best in India. The college has good lab facilities and clinics. The hostel doesn't have enough capacity. Seats are increasing every year so the college is facing problems to accommodate the increasing number students taking admission every year.

reviews.review_heading: It was good for research purposes in veterinary science in the nation.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities as per feels. Hostel life was charming and fun-loving. People taught different cultures and traditions from their places as almost all festivals were celebrated. Food was of good quality depending on the prices charged. Different state messes were available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the Mecca and Medina of Veterinary Science.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities like Wi-Fi, library, and courts are provided. Girls' hostel is well-maintained with proper cleanliness, a badminton court, Wi-Fi, and hygienic food in the mess. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, including SMART boards, space, and ventilation.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Doon Valley Group of Institutes offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and B.Ed. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Doon Valley Group of Institutes offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for Doon Valley Group of Institutes courses range between INR 1,26,220 to 1,54,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Doon Valley Group of Institutes has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidate must have passed graduation from a recognised University/Institute.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed minimum 3 years Diploma Examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.B.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination conducted by the respective State/ Central Government authorities recognised as equivalent to 10+2 examination by the Association of Indian Universities (AIU) with English as one of the subjects and Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics (P.C.M.) and or Biology (P.C.B) as optional subjects
individually.
Candidate should attain the age of 17 years or more on 31-12-2020.The age shall be determined as per entry in the Matriculation/Secondary school or its equivalent examination certificate.
Candidates who have qualified any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India equivalent to any of the above examinations are also eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.D.PharmaCandidate must have completed 17 years of age in the year of admission.

faqs.answer: Yes, Doon Valley Group of Institutes is a recognised educational institution in India. It is known for offering a range of programs in fields like engineering, management, and applied sciences. The institute has gained a reputation for its focus on quality education, experienced faculty, and strong industry connections, which aid in student placements and internships. Its modern infrastructure and emphasis on extracurricular activities also contribute to its popularity among students seeking a well-rounded educational experience.
faqs.question: Q: Is Doon Valley Group of Institutes a known institute?

faqs.answer: Doon Valley Group of Institutes is a reputed institute for B.Ed, B.Tech, B.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, After 1th Diploma, D.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Teaching & Education, Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Doon Valley Group of Institutes has a review rating of 3.3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 3.4 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.
faqs.question: Q: Is Doon Valley Group of Institutes a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Doon Valley Group of Institutes is mostly a highly reputed institution that promotes quality education and skill development. An institution such as this one provides an array of courses in engineering, management, and hospitality. It consists of experienced faculty members and modern infrastructure. The placement cell here is very proactive in assisting students in getting the best in the market for internships and job opportunities with leading companies. Apart from this, it also promotes extracurricular activities, which assists in the proper development of a student. Quality perceptions would vary, so it's better to research widely, visit the campus, and seek the current students or alumni for some feedback before making a decision.
faqs.question: Q: Is Doon Valley Group of Institutes good?

faqs.answer: Doon Valley Group of Institutes is renowned for its commitment to quality education across various fields, including engineering and management. The institution boasts an experienced faculty with strong academic and industry backgrounds, ensuring that students receive valuable mentorship. Its modern infrastructure includes well-equipped laboratories, libraries, and recreational facilities, creating a conducive learning environment. The institute also maintains strong industry connections, facilitating internships and job placements for graduates. Additionally, Doon Valley promotes holistic development through extracurricular activities such as sports and cultural events, enhancing students' overall growth and making it a sought-after choice for aspiring professionals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: It was sort of okay type college.

content.Placements: Around 10 percent of students were placed small companies came. Not even a single renowned company came that year. I think around 2.4 LPA was offered to few students. I was not selected in that placement. Over all one has to search by himself they don't provide placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was okay not too good not bad. No Wi-Fi facility is available. Students were not allowed to use phone in the campus. The hostel food is not good. It was okay type. Canteen keeps on changed no sports events no medical facilities. No sports events.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty. We faced issues with the lack of faculty members at times.

content.Placements: The college offers good placement opportunities to lots of students during the placement season, which lasts for a month. They also provide many types of facilities during the exam, and they also provide good exposure to students for their bright future. Even our teachers guide students for their bright future and their career.
content.Infrastructure: There are a lot of classrooms, labs and library available for the students. We also have a canteen available for students. Our canteen also offers many types of foods items. They also provide good washroom facility, and even the water facility is available in almost all the blocks. There are separate classrooms available for different streams.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The college has bad academics and placements.

content.Placements: This is the worst college regarding placement records. No opportunity is given to any student so that the students can have a good start to their career. I will not recommend this college to anyone ever. Don't take admission in this college, and if you do so, then your future will be spoiled. The college did not take efforts for the students' placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was average on the campus. The classrooms were spacious to accommodate students. The buildings are surrounded by greenery. The only problem is the available facilities are not up to the mark, for example, the Wi-Fi facility is available, but the students are not given access. Even in computer labs, the speed of internet is slow.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Review of Doon Valley Group of Institutes.

content.Placements: There is no placement for mechanical engineering these days. There are a lot of placements for food technology and IT streams. In our batch, some of the batchmates were directly selected from the campus (food technology).
content.Infrastructure: It has a very good infrastructure and Doon Valley Institutions is famous for this. Lots of online exams are conducted here due to the availability of high-class computer labs. All hostels, cafeteria, library and college building are very good and clean. A Wi-Fi connection is available on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013

content.Other: College is average. Studies are good for marks point of view. But there is little emphasis on practical knowledge and you will feel that you are in a school not in college. Placements wise the college is very poor. No placement assistance from college side. Very big campus. Yes, there are fests in the college. One thing that is good is faculty. So, if you want to do a degree just for the sake of degree this college is the best option for you. But, if you want exposure then you should go for some other college.

reviews.review_heading: It was sort of okay type college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was okay not too good not bad. No Wi-Fi facility is available. Students were not allowed to use phone in the campus. The hostel food is not good. It was okay type. Canteen keeps on changed no sports events no medical facilities. No sports events.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty. We faced issues with the lack of faculty members at times.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of classrooms, labs and library available for the students. We also have a canteen available for students. Our canteen also offers many types of foods items. They also provide good washroom facility, and even the water facility is available in almost all the blocks. There are separate classrooms available for different streams.

reviews.review_heading: The college has bad academics and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average on the campus. The classrooms were spacious to accommodate students. The buildings are surrounded by greenery. The only problem is the available facilities are not up to the mark, for example, the Wi-Fi facility is available, but the students are not given access. Even in computer labs, the speed of internet is slow.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Doon Valley Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: It has a very good infrastructure and  Doon Valley Institutions is famous for this. Lots of online exams are conducted here due to the availability of high-class computer labs. reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our college with average salary packages. Our seniors got the highest salary package of 4 LPA, which is good for beginners. review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the required chemicals for practicals. The library is available in our college, and it contains many pharmacy-related books. They keep 2 newspapers daily on the main desk for students, so they can read about what's going on in the world. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. The hostel facility is available only for girls. The hostel facility is not available for boys, so boys face many issues with room rents. Our college canteen is small. Medical facilities are available such as a first aid kit. Many sports and games are organised during sports week like cricket, tennis, etc.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement cell in our college. Everyone who takes admission has started their own practice. Our college has its own hospital, which is of no use for students. fees_and_eligibility.overview: St. Joseph's College for Women provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and Humanities & Social Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 25,950 to 89,430. UG programs include B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. Further, the PG programs include MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and M.A.

review_summary.college_name: St. Joseph's College for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A.(English, Economics, Political Science) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A very good college which helped me know who I am.

content.Placements: Students were placed in several companies like Deloitte, HDFC Bank, and ICICI Bank. Roles offered were at the initial stage with good increments. About 60% of students got placements and rest are pursuing their Master's in various subjects, with many studying abroad and others in top universities in India.
content.Infrastructure: College had classes with whiteboards and projectors. College library was huge with complete collection of books from all departments and subjects, ranging from magazines to encyclopedias, everything was available. College hostel was for women with high security within the college premises. College canteen offers all types of food at pocket-friendly prices.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Bio-Technology, Bio-Chemistry, Chemistry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is very good to take admission, but some faculty are too strict.

content.Placements: About 50% of the students joined this course. Infrastructure facilities are good. 30–40 students get selected when they pass the interview. The top roles are as biotechnology and biochemistry laboratory assistants, research work, and developing drugs and antibiotics.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are wide, there is no Wi-Fi, labs are well maintained, all laboratory-related stuff is available, there is a very wide library with complete AC, and there are all kinds of books related to study and also novels. The hostel is good but sometimes the food is not. The canteen is very good; they provide all kinds of items, including burgers, puffs, ice cream, noodles, french fries, etc. The hostel facility is good.

paragraphs: St. Joseph's College for Women admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, St. Joseph's College for Women considers scores in AP PGCET, AUCET, and BIEAP for admission to specific courses.St. Joseph's College for Womenoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 25,950 - 89,430. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 36,000 - 85,200. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is better and worthy compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: In this college, classrooms are good. It also provides a huge library. Separate laboratories are available. Our college has a good focus on sports and some other courses.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and faculty is somewhat good but knowledgeable enough.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good for my course. Some classrooms are with digital boards. The library is too good with all the loving subjects ' books. It is too big. Hostel is somewhat strict and rooms are not that much good. 60% students choose the  hostel just to be safe. For security purpose our hostel is the best.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for colleges in Visakhapatnam for literature then it is the best option.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, and other facilities are good. Hostel food facilities aren't that great but are manageable. There are many clubs and associations for students to learn and grow. I'm not sure about the Science labs but the language lab and journalism lab are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: Labs, Wi-Fi, library, canteen, medical facilities and sports ground are available in our college. Hostel facilities are available on the campus. Food is also provided in the hostel. Classrooms are neat and clean. The college is very comfortable for the students, and they have many rewards.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are good and the infrastructure is great in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure wise college is really well built and really gives you a historical feel when you enter the college. However, the quality of the food is average and a person can't expect high-quality taste in this college. But the taste is good it's not that bad too. If you want you can eat there and hang around with your friends on the campus. Medical facility and sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.Be it infrastructure, placement, faculty it stands at the top.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were very spacious and good. We had an internet cafe, a very large and spacious campus gym, library with almost thousands of books and a very huge playground. The labs were also fully occupied with all the important materials and apparatus.

reviews.review_heading: I am a proud Josephine and proud of all the facilities my college provides.
reviews.review_text: I use to stay in the hostel and the food is bad. They don't allow us to keep phones or going out. I understand the discipline but then hostel life was bad but I had great friends to make it easier. There are all sort of facilities available. Canteen needs to improvise on the food menu.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Visakhapatnam apart from hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel was divided as for the local students and  NRI students. I always heard students complaining about the food served in the hostel. But now when I visit my college I see a lot of improvised versions. We did have medical, sports, and library facilities. Being in girls' college we were no less encouraged for taking up sports as a career. We had a proper coach. The library on the campus was beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for higher education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are fabulous, and there is a library with thousands of books. As I am a science student, our labs were excellent with all the equipment which we require for our experiments. Classrooms were good and are under CCTV surveillance. The hostel was good with a good guide.

reviews.review_heading: satisfied for education and extracurricular activities
reviews.review_text: the campus is fully covered with wifi and excellent infrastructure the campus looks peacefull... classrooms are well equipped with excellent library but with no air conditioner but the books are really good the mess food quality is below average and canteen..

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: The university offers a variety of programmes at different levels. However, some of the popular programmes of the university are BTech in Computer Science, Civil, Electrical, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and MBA. The BTech programme at the university is offered in these five branches. Selecting any branch offers skills and knowledge to enter and pursue a career in relevant fields. Another popular programme of the university at the master's level is the MBA. The programme offers the fundamental knowledge and specialized skills of expertise in finance, marketing, operations, human resources, or strategy. This two-year programme helps students to become good leaders, strategists, and experts in the industry. Students can choose a specialisation for the MBA programme out of four options available at the university which include Finance, Human Resources, IT, and Marketing.

placements.overview: FS University is a renowned university successfully operating for two decades. The university has been awarded multiple times by different bodies for its outstanding performance. It received the Excellence in Teaching Award as Best Impactful University of the Year 2022. It also received an award of Fastest Growing University in Uttar Pradesh by Deputy CM of UP.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

individual_reviews.title: College placement support, but not for all courses students. Classroom, library, and mess are good.

content.Placements: 0% placement in my course. Because this year placement company hired technical courses students. For an internship, a company comes to hire some students. This college provided best courses such as graduation, post-graduation, medical courses, nursing courses, law courses, and technical courses. Placement is good for technical students. I wish placement supported all the course students.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very nice, and the water quality is good. No available Wi-Fi. Classroom and library are very beautiful and quiet. Hostel and mess are all good. Medical support is very good. Sports and game movements are good.

individual_reviews.title: Finally, the college is completely good.

content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for course are very good. The quality of Wi-Fi and other facilities are available in our college. Labs are available. Library and facility of hostel are available. Good quality food is available in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_text: In my college, you see many big classrooms, labs, a library, and a hall. There are well-equipped Chemistry, Physics, and practical labs, which are good compared to other colleges. There are many courses and departments for students. B.Sc. students have their own department, BA students have theirs, and MSc students have theirs as well. In every department, there is WiFi with routers for students to use free data on phones and laptops for their studies. The quality of the mess and canteen is aver...

reviews.review_heading: I chose the wrong college, but you don't have to. Always choose an older college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were below average. There was no proper Wi-Fi network, with only 1–2 Wi-Fi connections on each floor. Libraries were pretty well maintained. I did not stay in a hostel, but my hostel friends said that the hostel was pretty good and well-maintained, though the food was average.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers a supportive environment for both academic and personal growth.
reviews.review_text: There were four buildings in the college, utilized for curricular, co-curricular, and extra-curricular activities. They were well-maintained, electrified and supplied with water facilities. The institution had spacious, well-ventilated and adequately furnished classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average because it is newly opened, but it is improving day by day.
reviews.review_text: The worst part was that the Wi-Fi did not work properly. Labs, classrooms, and the library were well-maintained. Hostel facilities were not very helpful for us. The canteen was neat and clean, and the taste of the food was average. There were many playgrounds on the campus for sports like volleyball, cricket, and badminton.

college_info.intro:
Ashwini College of Nursing offers several UG, PG, certificate and diploma programmes in the fields of Nursing and Allied Medical Sciences. The popular programmes offered at the college include BSc and GNM. The BSc programme is offered for a duration of three to four years. Some of the BSc specialisations offered at the college are listed below:
The General Nursing & Midwifery (GNM) programme is offered for a duration of three years. After completing the BSc programme from Ashwini College of Nursing, students can become Casualty Technicians, Trauma Care Specialists, Anaesthesia Technologists, OT Managers, or can take up several other career opportunities. Candidates can check the Ashwini College of Nursing popular programmes along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

placements.overview: Ashwini College of Nursing has a placement cell that looks after all the placement-related activities of the college. Ashwini College of Nursing boasts a 100% placement record for the past many years. As per the official website of the college, about 90% of Ashwini College of Nursing students are working in the government sector and 5% - 10% of students are working with reputed private hospitals and organisations. The college also offers internship opportunities to students in its associated hospitals and other affiliated hospitals.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Ashwini College of Nursing courses include BSc, Post Basic BSc Nursing, MSc Nursing, and GNM programmes, among others. The college also offers several certificate programmes, some of which are listed below:

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good learning environment, low fees, and a decent campus. Overall, it was worth it.

review_content.Placements: Placement wasn't applicable for MBBS as it was a medical course. After the internship, most students pursue PG or government jobs. All students completed 100% of their internships in hospitals. There were no companies or packages like in engineering roles. As junior residents, or intern doctors, overall, it was the best.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel and mess facilities were basic but manageable. The environment was mostly academic, with enough opportunities to grow.
review_content.Faculty: Mahamaya Rajkiya Allopathic Medical College was a decent option for MBBS, especially for students from SC/ST/OBC categories due to its low fees and government support. The total fees were very affordable compared to private colleges, making it a good choice for middle-class families. The teaching faculty was mostly well-qualified with degrees like MD/MS and knowledgeable in their subjects. Most teachers were helpful and tried to clear students' doubts, especially during practical and clinical postings. However, like in many government colleges, some teachers still followed traditional teaching methods.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Awesome college and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: 100 percent placements and internships are provided by the college. Students are paid stipend for internships. Good number of selections in AIPGMEE with a number of 100 admission per year on the basis of AIPMT marks.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lecture hall for students. There is also a library for the students which is available for 24*7. Administration block and common hall is also provided. For students and faculty, medical facility is available 24x7. Sports and games both outdoor and indoor are available too like cricket, tennis, football, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Mahamaya Rajkiya Allopathic Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A good college, decent infrastructure and facilities in such low feels.

content.Placements: There is a batch of 100 students. After 5.5 years, including 4.5 years of academics and 1 year of internship from the attached hospital, you have to do a compulsory job as a Junior Resident Doctor through a bond as per the guidelines of the Uttar Pradesh government. The average salary of a Junior Resident Doctor is 1.08 LPA. One can get released from the compulsory bond if they get admission to PG courses.
content.Infrastructure: Classes are decent, with no Wi-Fi. Labs are good, and there is a central library with a variety of books for undergraduate and postgraduate students. Hostel facilities are not that good but have the necessary amenities. There is a mess, but the food quality is not up to expectations. Medical facilities are free for medical students. Football, volleyball, and cricket grounds are available, and there is also a badminton court.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a really great medical college in Uttar Pradesh.

content.Placements: In our college, five hundred students study at a time, and our batch has hundreds of students. After completing our degree from our college, we are eligible for jobs with a salary of about 70,000 per month, and the minimum salary could be 14,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The condition of hostels, libraries and canteen is good. As compared to other colleges, our college is the best in providing facilities. There are many faculty members who take regular classes, which is the best compared to other colleges.

content.Placements: Every student, after completing 4th year (final year), is eligible for 1 year mandatory internship. This college has its own hospital and PG courses. Many more doctors have opportunities to join this hospital and for higher studies. There is also post-graduate course. Many more opportunities are offered by this college.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is good and average maintained. Classrooms are good. Library is available. There is a seperate ground for cricket, football, etc. In hostel, the items that hostel management gives are table, chair, fan, pillow, bed, and bedsheet. There is water cooler, and at the gate there is a gateman. Mess is also big. Electricity facilities are also very good.

Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Banking, Finance & Insurance, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. RITEE Group of Institutes has a review rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Can RITEE Group of Institutes be considered a good college?

answer.text: RITEE Group of Institutes has been rated 3.6 on placements on the basis of 133 reviews done by students.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at RITEE Group of Institutes?

answer.text: RITEE Group of Institutes offers median package range of INR 573,333 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance programme and has been rated 3.6 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.

faqs.question: What is the median package offered at RITEE Group of Institutes during placements?

answer.text: As per information available, Clinomic Center for Clinical Research Pvt. Ltd., Andheri West has recorded (aprx) INR 600,000 median salary to students for B.E. / B.Tech course during placements.

overview_faqs.question: Can RITEE Group of Institutes be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: RITEE Group of Institutes is a reputed institute for MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Banking, Finance & Insurance, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. RITEE Group of Institutes has a review rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: RITEE Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am totally satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Placement is quite good for computer science department. Top companies like infosys, tech mahindra etc. are visiting our campus for recruiting students. Many students are also recruited off campus in big companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the campus. There are 5 computer labs and 3 cad labs. Classrooms are also good. There is a library, where all types of books are available. Hostel facilities are not too good. Mess food is not very good. Sports facilities are good. We have 2 playgrounds in the campus.
content.Faculty: Teachers are not well qualified and experienced. The teaching quality is good. Course curriculum is relevant. It makes us ready for the industry. Semester exams are quite hard.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: In biotechnology, placements are quite good but not excellent. The number of students in biotechnology is very low, so all students get easily placed in different companies. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit our campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. There is the main library and two bio labs. Our classes are huge. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel facility at this college is not so good. There is no air conditioning. They do not provide for basic needs. The mess food is not good or hygienic. The canteen food is also not good. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and games facilities are quite good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are very helpful. The college provides all facilities.

content.Placements: In Computer Science, about 99% students get placed by college in different companies with high packages or low packages. The highest package of our college is 22 lakhs and lowest package is 2.5 Lakhs. Most of the students get packages between 4 -5 Lakhs. Top companies for our courses are Infosys, Google and Tata etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is widely spread in 20 acres. We 3 playgrounds and one function ground. Wi-fi facility is provided in whole campus. We have one library in campus where all types of books are available. Hostel facilities are not so good. Living facilities are average but food facility is not so good. For sports students, this college is best. The college provides all facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of RITEE Group of Institutes.

content.Placements: Many students got placed in different companies with decent salary packages. The highest salary package offered was 22 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Our college provides internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has 2 acres of land, and the infrastructure is good. We have three playgrounds on campus. It has a library with several books. Our campus also has Wi-Fi access.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are not good. They are also not well-qualified. Our course curriculum is good, and it makes students ready for the industry. Our college also provides training for students with low grades. Exams are tough in the first two semesters.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm totally satisfied with college.

content.Placements: Here placement is quite good. In CSE department, maximum students get placed in different companies whereas in other branches also, good number of students get placed. In CSE good companies come for recruiting. Overall, 80% students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is quite better than other colleges. In campus, we have one central library, for CSE we have 3 labs and campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel facilities are not so good. Mess facilities are very bad. Canteen is good in campus. Sports and games facilities are quite good.

admission_process.title: RITEE Group of Institutes Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RITEE Group of Institutes admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.RITEE Group of Institutesoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Sc., B.Sc. (Post Basic), MCA and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 96,000 - 3,28,600. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in RITEE Group of Institutes for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
RITEE Group of Institutes has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate Upper age limit is 40 years for UR category,  45 years for PWD who belongs to UR category of Chattisgarh,  43 years for SC/ST/OBC and Female category of Chattisgarh, and 45 years for PWD who belongs to SC/ST/OBC and female category of Chattisgarh as on 1st of July of academic year.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who has passed Diploma in Engineering/Architecture from a recognised board/university with 45% marks for UR category (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC and PWD category of Chattisgarh) can also apply for the course.
Candidate passing 10th/12th through distance learning/open school shall be eligible for admission.
Candidate passed Diploma programme through distance learning shall not be eligible to apply.
If the candidate has passed 10+2 examination, but failed in one or more compulsory subject than the candidate shall not be considered eligible for admission.

faqs.answer: Courses offerred by RITEE Group of Institutes are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at RITEE Group of Institutes goes up to 756.

cut_off.college_name: RITEE Group of Institutes Cutoff 2025: Check CG PET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: RITEE College Raipur cutoff 2025 will be released soon for admission to the BE/BTech courses. In the meantime, aspirants seeking admission can check the sections below to view RITEE College Raipur cutoff 2024 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories to understand the cutoff trends. A few more updates are given below:

RITEE College Raipur CG PET cutoff 2025 has been released for the second round for candidates waiting to get admission to B.E. / B.Tech course. The cutoff list was released category-wise as opening-closing cutoff ranks. The cutoff ranks also varied on the basis of gender, as some reservations were made for Female category students.

CG PET cutoff 2025 is finally out for students seeking admission to various undergraduate engineering courses in the state of Chhattisgarh. RITEE College Raipur has also released the second round cutoff list for aspiring candidates, based on JEE Main scores and CG PET counselling. The minimum cutoff for admission to any branch was 2167, for candidates belonging to the General HS category. The maximum required cutoff rank is 3525 during Round 2 admission.

The Directorate of Technical Education (DTE) have announced the CG PET 2025 counselling dates online. CG PET 2025 seat allotment results are being announced separately for the different rounds of counselling. Allotment of seats will be done based on the candidate's obtained rank, preferences, category and seat availability. Candidates can check out the important CGPET 2025 datesc in the table below:

Below are the RITEE College Raipur CG PET consolidated PDFs for students interested in seeking admission to the college for B.E. / B.Tech course. Students can view or download the PDFs to view the round and year-wise cutoff lists.

In this section, candidates can check the cutoff of colleges and specialisations available for admission based on the CG PET latest round cutoff ranks. To do the comparison based on other parameters, such as location, category, etc., students can use the filter provided.

reviews.review_text: The campus is huge. It has a great library. Wi-Fi is open for everyone with a speed of 1 mbps. The campus has a clean and good environment for study. It has separate hostels for both girls and boys in just 200m from campus. Good food is available in the mess and canteen. The college conducts Rito fest, that includes sports like cricket, volleyball, football, and dance.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RITEE Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is a bit good and is well maintained, but it can be more advanced as per their fees for students. They keep it clean and maintain it very well which attracts people towards it, and it got a plus point of the environment around the campus which is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not really satisfied with my studies. However, college life is good here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average here. Computer labs are available, but their situation is not very good. Classrooms are also average, but the signal strength of Wi-Fi is good. The library is good with a facility of E-library. Hostel facilities are fine, and the mess changes money regularly as per the request of students. Sports and games are fine. Indoor games are also available such as table tennis, carrom and chess. There are outdoor sports such as basketball, football, cricket, handball, kho-kho, etc.

reviews.review_heading: RITEE is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: There are nice facilities and infrastructure in this course. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, etc., are available. There is a nice quality hostel, and the food served in the mess is very good in quality. Medical facilities are excellent, and sports and games facilities are also excellent.

highlights.summary: Radharaman Group of Institutes was founded in 2003. It is an institute located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Radharaman Group of Institutes courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and After 10th levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and PCI and offers courses in Full Time mode. Radharaman Group of Institutes offers a total of 38 courses in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Nursing. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and B.Pharma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 200. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Construction Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 36,000 to 6,66,000. Apart from this, the Radharaman Group of Institutes campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 36,000 to 6,66,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Pharma. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Pharma.

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.
faqs.question: Q: Why do nurses fail Nursing classes?

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in engineering in 2024 and 2025 with really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 40–50 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 7.5 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average package offered in our course is 4 LPA. Companies like RapidOps, TCS, Infosys, Netlink, etc., visited the campus. Around 50 percent of students in my course got internships. Roles offered include web developer, Java developer, app developer, game developer, full-stack web developer, front-end developer, and back-end developer.
content.Infrastructure: My department has computer labs and a big, well-stocked library with many types of books. Strong Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is average, but the hostel's mess food is amazing. The canteen food is also better. Medical facilities are good, with all types of physicians available. There is a big cricket ground, a kho-kho ground, and a volleyball ground.

individual_reviews.title: College faculty members are very good and hardworking.

content.Infrastructure: Lab, classroom, library, and canteen are present in my college. This such thing that has clean ever and proper cleaning in 2-3 days or library presents. The environment is peaceful and all chemicals are present in the lab. It has one blackboard and desk present in classroom.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: Radharaman Group of Institutes Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 8 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in engineering in 2024 and 2025 with really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: My department has computer labs and a big, well-stocked library with many types of books. Strong Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is average, but the hostel's mess food is amazing. The canteen food is also better. Medical facilities are good, with all types of physicians available. There is a big cricket ground, a kho-kho ground, and a volleyball ground.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Radharaman Institute of Pharmaceutical SciencesReviewed on 7 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College faculty members are very good and hardworking.
reviews.review_text: Lab, classroom, library, and canteen are present in my college. This such thing that has clean ever and proper cleaning in 2-3 days or library presents. The environment is peaceful and all chemicals are present in the lab. It has one blackboard and desk present in classroom.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Radharaman College of PharmacyReviewed on 7 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities. Faculty members are too supportive.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel facilities both are good and food of the hostel is average. It has a library full of books, and it also has a digital library in the college with access to many books. It conducts many games like shot put, tennis court, kabaddi, cricket, etc. There is an indoor stadium where the students can refresh themselves.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An above average college with friendly facilities, decent placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not there on campus, but the buses are there to take students from the hostel to college. Classrooms are good but nothing advanced it's just a simple board also it's a single board class. Wi-Fi is not available for the students either in computer labs or on campus. Mess food is average. Hostel rooms are decent. There is some sports equipment but people barely use any other equipment except for cricket once. The medical facility is also decent, but there is no insurance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: According to fees, this college is good.
reviews.review_text: Library is good but the computer lab is average because most of the system doesn't work. Hostels are very bad. I have lived in a hostel for 2 years. The quality of food is very bad and they give breakfast very limited. Rooms are good, clean, and huge but the quality of food is very bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 23 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfactions - from our college.
reviews.review_text: Spacious classrooms, washrooms, playgrounds, and big infrastructure are available. There is a ground for cricket and football. Canteen is available. There are no medical facilities and Wi-Fi available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Radharaman College of PharmacyReviewed on 30 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a perfect college life experience.
reviews.review_text: College conducts so many events like fests, cultural events, festive events, sports events. , etc. It has a library full of books, and it also had a digital library in the college with access to many books it conducts many games like shot put, tennicoit, kabbaddi, cricket etc. There is an indoor stadium where the students can refresh themselves there are many clubs in the college for each department in data Science department there are 5 clubs: *dataminds learning workshop club *novaversity club...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Radharaman College of PharmacyReviewed on 30 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: My experience at campus placements.
reviews.review_text: Minimal books are provided in the library. We have a digital library. It has old books and old project submissions. The hostel registration is simple. We have to fill in other details in the college application by submitting it to the administration office. The meal quality is average and less affordability cost. The menu is less. There are no fast food and non-vegetarian items in the canteen. I rented a room outside in Guntur. There is a third-party hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Radharaman Institute of Pharmaceutical SciencesReviewed on 4 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty , Placement , Infrastructure are good
reviews.review_text: There are various college societies available Aakriti, Raag, Malang, Verve, Fitoor. Rotaract club is also in the college. Their main work is during any festival, farewell etc. Talking about the fests, no annual fests are held due to the lack of space. There is a small ground in the campus where you can play basketball, badminton, cricket etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 22 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: In 2012, the average placement at our college was 85%.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are that we have 3 to 4 computer labs in our college, of which 2 or 3 have network connectivity and we have one library that has too many books. At least 40 people in the same stream can have books at the same time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 22 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements before COVID-19 because after COVID, the quality of students gets down day by day.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are: we have 4 to 5 computer labs in our college, of which 2 or 3 have network connectivity and we have one library that has too many books. At least 50 people in the same stream can have books at the same time. We don't have any hostels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 14 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: The negative point of this college is that it is in the outer area of the city.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for our BTech course in computer science engineering are that we have 4–5 different computer labs. In which two of them have internet connectivity, all of the labs have a minimum of 50 computers in there labs, and the library has enough books for 50 students at the same time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 12 Mar 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Review of my college after 3 years of passing .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good.
Don't know about Wi-Fi now because it was not there when I was studying.
There is a big library to study and more than 1000s of books are there.
I have no idea about hostel because I never enquired about it and I have never heard of hostels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2016Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 23 Feb 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the placements at all.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. Wide blue glass décor. It has a spacious library. Canteen provides all kinds of tasty food and also has waiters to serve it . Its a good mess facility in hostel. Volleyball and tennis are there and computer labs are large.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Radharaman Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 10 Jan 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was good. This college was located in the perfect area. It also provided a huge library. There were many good faculty members. The food served in the hostel was better. Hostels were also well-maintained. The mess was better. Canteen was also good.
